Restored truncated Steps 6/7. All 7 steps clean with typed dict schemas. Root cause: prior fix wrote corrupted base64 causing garbled text in agent prompt.

ERR_004.impact: All CI runs failing since commit 8b1d593
ERR_004.fix_description: Ready to push: move TA-Lib install step out of `with:` block in .github/workflows/ci.yml. Blocked by GitHub OAuth write connection failure.

migrations.title: Upstash Redis Universal State Store
migrations.description: Migrated all 19 APEX agents (13 NSE equity + 6 Forex) and 5 recipe TASK.md files from manage_memories (Nebula platform) to Upstash Redis REST API. Root cause: manage_memories fails with JSON serialization error in trigger execution contexts. New architecture: agents write pipe-delimited strings directly to DB1 (live state) or DB2 (intelligence) via HTTPS REST. No redis-py required. See docs/UPSTASH_MEMORY_GUIDE.md.
